command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
# Find the test run workspace
JOB_DIR=$(ls -td memory/execution-pipeline/governed/_test_* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
echo "Test job dir: $JOB_DIR"

# Check if phase-test-001 exists anywhere 
find memory/ -path '*phase-test-001*' -name 'run-state.json' 2>/dev/null | tail -3

# Show last bg workspace
BGDIR=$(find memory/ -path '*phase-test-001*_background*' -name 'run-state.json' 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
echo "BG state: $BGDIR"
if [ -n "$BGDIR" ]; then
    cat "$BGDIR"
    echo '---WORKER LOG---'
    cat "$(dirname $BGDIR)/worker.log" 2>/dev/null | head -30
fi

# Check what test creates for job - look at the test setup
grep -n 'phase-test-001\|job_id\|create_job\|_safe_job_id' tests/test_moreno_governed_async_v253.py | head -20
ENDSSH
